title: 5 Children Are Killed After Van and S.U.V. Collide in Rural Ontario
summary_full: The children — four girls and one boy — were among 10 people in the van at the time of the crash. An infant was seriously injured, the police said.
summary_public: The children — four girls and one boy — were among 10 people in the van at the time of the crash. An infant was seriously injured, the police said.
